title: Jubran Whalan
compiled_truth: Jubran Whalan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-15 to 2001-11-01), Jubran Whalan sent 6 and received 709 emails, totalling 715 interactions. Top correspondents: [Neil Bresnan](people/neil-bresnan) (5), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (4), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (4), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (4), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (3).
